sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n89121" key="proseceu/resis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">προσεξ-εύρεσις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n89121.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">additional discovery</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.1135d</biblScope> </bibl> (pl.).</sense> </entryFree>
